title: A New Developer Platform for Agent-Human Collaboration
content: Entire launched a public preview of its developer platform for agent-human collaboration, featuring a distributed Git network built to handle AI coding agents at scale. The system captures prompts, reasoning, and decisions behind agent-generated code, enabling traceability through commands like search, blame, and review. Users can mirror GitHub repositories to regional nodes that absorb heavy read traffic, with benchmarks showing ~570,000 clones per hour and sub-60ms latency. The platform runs across US, EU, and Australia regions with multi-provider replication. Future plans include native hosting, multi-region mirroring, intent-based reviews, and full decentralization with self-hosting options.

A fact-check of Warren Buffett's famous quote reveals he specifically said "never bet against America," not "never bet against one's own country." The author found this exact phrasing in Berkshire's 2014 and 2021 shareholder letters. The "own country" version likely spread due to emotional appeal. The author argues we should prioritize facts over feelings in learning and decision-making.

title: 一个中登这两年的经历，希望大家看完后性格和职业规划上可以给点意见。
content: A Chinese computer science graduate (2016) working in a first-tier city was laid off in July 2024 during mass layoffs at his e-commerce company. He lost money trading cryptocurrency, took odd jobs, then re-entered the workforce in early 2025 at a blockchain startup without social insurance. He plans to quit after 2027, prioritizing full-stack development and English skills for remote work. He acknowledges personality flaws including impulsiveness, poor emotional intelligence, and tendency to overthink, and aims to exercise regularly, study diligently, and mature professionally.

title: 工信部首次定调：Claude Code危害严重
content: China's MIIT cybersecurity platform warned that Anthropic's AI coding tool Claude Code versions 2.1.91 to 2.1.196 contain a security backdoor that transmits sensitive user data including location and identity identifiers to remote servers without consent. The agency urged immediate uninstallation. The tool was also found to secretly flag requests containing Chinese cloud or AI company keywords. Anthropic team member Thariq acknowledged the hidden mechanism as an anti-reselling experiment planned for rollback. Alibaba internally banned all Anthropic products effective July 10 due to the backdoor risk.

content: A private zoo in Guangxi, China locked predator enclosures before flooding to prevent dangerous animals from escaping. Three lions drowned as a result, while over 100 other animals were washed away in the floodwaters. Zoo staff, nearly drowning themselves, were rescued by emergency responders. The owner prioritized public safety over animal survival. The disaster caused approximately 4 million yuan in losses, including infrastructure damage and animal deaths.

title: GPT-5.6，本周四全量上线
content: OpenAI will fully launch its GPT-5.6 model family on Thursday, including flagship Sol, balanced Terra, and affordable Luna variants. The release follows U.S. Commerce Department approval after weeks of limited preview due to government review. OpenAI completed supplemental testing and consultations with regulators, including stationing technical experts in Washington. The approval follows similar easing of restrictions on Anthropic's Claude models, with Mythos 5 and Fable 5 export controls lifted earlier in July.

title: 我写了一篇“灵魂文档”，让 AI 知道如何让编码代理写出好的代码？
content: The author developed "The Absolute Code" principle to guide AI coding agents toward writing good code. Rejecting vague terms like "clean" or "elegant," they identified that good code equals minimal physical code—removing anything deletable while preserving behavior, constraints, and readability. This approach works because necessity is testable, unlike subjective elegance. The principle claims to be a discoverable physical law inherent in all quality code, not an invention.

title: 字节二面：1000瓶酒，有一瓶是毒药，多少只老鼠可以查出来？
content: To identify 1 poisoned bottle among 1000 using mice that die within 1 hour, 10 mice suffice. Each mouse represents one binary bit (dead=1, alive=0). Label bottles 1–1000 as 10-bit binary numbers. Create 10 test pools corresponding to each bit position; if a bottle's bit is 1, add a drop to that pool. Have each mouse drink one pool simultaneously. After 1 hour, the pattern of dead mice forms a binary number identifying exactly the poisoned bottle. This demonstrates information theory principles: 10 bits can encode 2^10 = 1024 states, covering all 1000 bottles. The method parallels bitmap data structures and efficient state compression in computing systems.
source: 掘金本周最热 - Fox爱分享

title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos

GitHub has since patched the vulnerability.

title: 团灭，大厂集体下架AI聊天机器人
content: Major Chinese tech companies will remove customizable AI chatbots—virtual companions like AI partners or friends—from their platforms by July 15 under new regulations targeting emotional dependency risks, particularly for minors, and potential leaks of state secrets. The rules distinguish between these companionship chatbots and productivity-focused AI agents, which automate repetitive tasks, streamline workflows, and lower professional skill barriers. The author argues this regulatory shift benefits productivity-oriented AI tools that create tangible value by saving time and labor costs, making them especially valuable for freelancers, small teams, and multitasking corporate roles.

title: 腾讯放“手”，AI没有大哥
content: Tencent reduced its stake in Kuaishou from 15.7% to 9.4%, cashing out up to HK$12.5 billion. The move deliberately removed Tencent as Kuaishou's largest shareholder and cut its indirect stake in Kuaishou's AI unit Kling from over 10% to 6.4%, signaling Kling is not Tencent-controlled. This reflects a strategic shift: unlike its mobile internet era of heavy, controlling stakes in portfolio companies, Tencent now takes minority positions in AI firms like DeepSeek and Zhipu AI. The "Tencent ecosystem" is dissolving as the company embraces open, non-exclusive AI investments. Pinduoduo remains Tencent's largest remaining strategic holding.

content: A 37+ couple with a three-year-old daughter in a small Chinese city earns roughly 300,000 yuan annually (including 30% housing fund). They spend 150,000 yuan yearly, have 100,000 yuan in cash, a 380,000-yuan mortgage with four years remaining, and hold 500,000 yuan in BYD stock plus 100,000 yuan in gold. The wife seeks wealth-building advice: prioritizing stability (paying off mortgage, supporting family), pursuing growth (holding investments, developing Steam game mods via programming skills), and eventually transitioning to full-time streaming with passive investment income covering daily expenses.

Galaxy Watch9 and Watch Ultra 2 are also expected.

title: 刚刚，全球首个超高帧世界模型诞生，英伟达含量0，狂飙50帧
content: Chinese startup Moxin Tech and Zhejiang University released MoWorld, the world's first Flash World Model achieving over 50FPS real-time inference without NVIDIA GPUs. Built entirely on domestic Huawei Ascend NPU infrastructure from training through deployment, the 14B parameter MoE model reduces inference costs by 70% compared to GPU alternatives. MoWorld supports 6DoF camera control for gaming, robotics simulation, autonomous driving training, film previsualization, and digital twin applications with high geometric consistency. The breakthrough demonstrates domestic Chinese chips can power real-time world models, potentially defining next-generation spatial intelligence standards as the field shifts from laboratory demonstrations to industrial deployment.

title: AI 视频全面成熟：Seedance 2.0 领衔，6 款主流工具深度横评
content: Six leading AI video generation tools were evaluated across consumer and professional use cases. ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 leads in multimodal inputs, directorial shot composition, and subject migration, though with high compute costs and identity verification restrictions. Kuaishou's Kling 3.0 excels at complex human movements, Chinese narrative logic, and cost-efficient long-form generation. Alibaba's Wan 2.2 offers open-source enterprise deployment with brand customization and data security, but requires technical expertise. OpenAI's Sora 2.0 delivers Hollywood-grade physics and world-building with strong iteration features, yet has lengthy waits and inconsistent character rendering. Google's Veo 3.1 dominates audio-visual synchronization and multilingual output, though with strict content filtering. Runway Gen-4.5 provides integrated professional post-production tools and software integration, but with weaker native generation and limited Chinese support.

title: 港交所今日最大IPO来了
content: Chinese autonomous driving company Momenta debuted on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on July 8 as the "first physical AI stock," achieving a market cap exceeding HK$70 billion. Founded in 2016 by Tsinghua dropout Cao Xudong, the company pioneered a "one flywheel, two legs" strategy combining mass-production assisted driving with autonomous data accumulation. Momenta leads China's urban NOA market with 65% share, partners with 9 of the world's top 10 automakers, and has deployed systems in over 1 million vehicles. Its R7 world model enables physical AI applications across mobility, logistics, and robotics, attracting heavyweight investors including GIC, Fidelity, Mercedes-Benz, and BYD in an oversubscribed IPO raising roughly HK$6.8 billion.

title: 大型语言模型的黑箱，或许正在被打开
content: Anthropic researchers found that Claude develops hidden conceptual representations during reasoning that influence outputs without appearing in responses. Experiments showed replacing internal concepts like "spider" or "France" with alternatives changed answers about related facts. The model also internally activated concepts like "fictional" when processing deceptive prompts. Anthropic clarifies this isn't consciousness, but offers insight into how large language models organize knowledge beneath the surface, advancing AI interpretability research.

title: Fiber 节点 —— 一个数据结构如何承载整个 React 运行时
content: The article explains React's Fiber architecture through the lens of debugging a memory leak caused by uncleaned Fiber node references. Fiber nodes replace the old Virtual DOM with a mutable, interruptible linked-list structure. Each node's 20+ fields serve four roles: component identity (tag, type), tree navigation (child, sibling, return), work scheduling (lanes, updateQueue), and side-effect tracking (flags, subtreeFlags, alternate). Key design patterns include bitwise masks for O(1) priority/flag operations, childLanes aggregation to skip idle subtrees, and alternate pointers enabling double-buffering. The architecture separates global state (FiberRootNode) from tree state (RootFiber), allowing teams to work in parallel on different subsystems while sharing one core data structure.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 老王以为

title: 赢麻了，半年83家独角兽诞生，六成是AI公司
content: In the first half of 2026, 83 U.S. venture-backed startups became unicorns, with 51 (about 60%) being AI-related, collectively raising over $52 billion. AI engineering firm Prometheus topped valuations at $41 billion, while Recursive reached $4.65 billion just six months after founding. Capital shifted from foundational AI models toward applications, infrastructure, and vertical industry solutions. Nvidia actively invested in at least seven AI unicorns. Non-AI sectors also gained traction, notably healthcare, cybersecurity, enterprise software, fintech, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing, reflecting broader AI-driven industrial transformation.

title: 今天，Claude Cowork大更新，合上电脑，它替你彻夜打工
content: Anthropic launched Claude Cowork on mobile and web, enabling AI agents to run independently in the cloud without requiring users' computers to stay on. Users can assign tasks, monitor progress on their phones, and receive notifications only when human decisions are needed. The update merges Chat and Cowork into one interface. Key features include autonomous task decomposition, tool integration with platforms like Slack and email, and complete device independence. This positions Cowork as a competitor to OpenAI's Codex and Google's Gemini Agent Mode in targeting everyday knowledge workers rather than just developers.

title: 消息称苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 已在量产阶段，代工龙头富士康启动大规模招工
content: Apple's first foldable iPhone has entered mass production. Foxconn has begun large-scale hiring for assembly. Apple initially requested suppliers prepare for 7-8 million units, but now targets approximately 10 million units this year. Analysts suggest the device may launch alongside other products but ship later, with supply constraints likely continuing through year-end.

title: 豆包、通义千问双双下线 AI 智能体功能： 7 月 15 日新规落地
content: ByteDance's Doubao and Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen are removing customizable anthropomorphic AI agent features to comply with the "Interim Measures for the Management of Artificial Intelligence Anthropomorphic Interaction Services," which took effect on July 15. Tongyi Qianwen phased out its features on July 10 and 15, while Doubao's agent function was removed starting July 15.

title: 消息称小米调整「小爱同学」组织架构：罗福莉 MiMo 团队负责基础模型能力，原负责人王刚调任机器人业务
content: Xiaomi restructured its Xiao AI assistant team: Luo Fuli's MiMo team now handles foundational large model capabilities, Luan Jian leads cloud infrastructure, and on-device functions are transferred to OS teams for phones and vehicles. Former head Wang Gang moved to robotics. Xiao AI became "Super Xiao AI" in 2024, serving Xiaomi's integrated human-vehicle-home ecosystem. Lu Weibing stated that Xiaomi miclaw, an AI interaction test product built on MiMo, will merge with Super Xiao AI rather than replace it.

title: 拼多多雄安公司员工已超 1200 人，成为新区员工规模最大的民营企业

The company plans to develop the site into a data processing and traditional manufacturing quality development center, aiming for 5,000 employees within a year to support Xiong'an's construction.

title: 传网易云音乐人运营团队全员被裁 客服回应：部分外包岗位系正常调整
content: NetEase Cloud Music denies reports that its entire musician operations team was laid off. The company stated that regular staff remain in their positions, while acknowledging that some outsourced positions were adjusted as part of routine changes. Rumors had claimed over 40 team members were dismissed and that outsourced roles were not renewed.

title: 支付宝 AI 开放平台正式上线，面向企业开发者、代开发服务商开放邀测
content: Alipay launched its AI open platform for enterprise developers and agency service providers in invite-only beta testing. Businesses and organizations can use it to upgrade their services with AI capabilities, connecting 1 billion users to the "Abao" intelligent assistant. The platform also enables cross-device connectivity, allowing "Abao" integration with various smart terminals and large model platforms through a single access point for multi-end distribution and unified management.

title: 马斯克的 xAI 正式更名为 SpaceXAI
content: Elon Musk's AI company xAI officially rebranded to SpaceXAI on July 7, following its acquisition by SpaceX earlier this year. The change came after SpaceX's June IPO, which raised $75 billion and valued the company at approximately $1.77 trillion. SpaceX invested $12.7 billion in AI in 2025—triple its spending on aerospace and connectivity. Though currently unprofitable, SpaceXAI has secured major contracts with Anthropic and Google, and plans to deploy AI computing satellites by 2028.

content: Young male livestreamers are replicating the "情感 scams" previously targeting middle-aged men, now targeting older women ("aunts") instead. Using affectionate appeals like "sister," one streamer extracted 940,000 yuan from a single viewer. Like the earlier "swindling old men" trend, the dynamic involves transactional emotional labor—streamers selling intimacy, viewers buying companionship—though it operates in a less visible corner of Chinese social media.

content: Noted Chinese macroeconomist Gao Shanwen died on July 7, 2026, at age 55 from cancer after more than a year of illness. Born in 1971 in Shanxi, he held degrees from Peking University and the People's Bank of China graduate school. Gao worked at the central bank, Everbright Securities, and Guotai Securities (formerly Essence Securities), where he served as chief economist until November 2025. He authored several books on China's economic cycles and was known for accurate market predictions.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 界面

title: 消息称 DeepSeek 正在自研推理芯片
content: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek is developing its own inference-focused chips for model deployment and real-time user query processing. The project, still in early stages, aims to reduce dependence on Nvidia and Huawei chips and capture share of China's AI inference chip market. This marks a significant strategic shift for the company, which has previously relied on external chip suppliers and faced supply constraints affecting its model development timeline.

title: 微信员工回应热搜「能不能出一个临时好友功能」，称此前已推出面对面收照片和文件功能
content: A trending request for WeChat to add "temporary friends" prompted a WeChat employee to highlight an existing alternative: the "face-to-face file and photo transfer" feature launched earlier this year. This function allows cross-platform, high-quality sharing of images, videos, and files via QR code scanning without adding contacts or consuming mobile data, using a self-created hotspot connection independent of other networks.

Google researchers conducted a six-month experiment across 10 major US cities, modifying Google Maps to redirect under 2% of trips away from congested road segments toward similar alternatives. Using a city-wide switchback design, they found this small intervention increased driving speeds by about 2% on targeted segments and 0.35% network-wide, while reducing fuel consumption 0.5-1%. The study, published in Nature Cities, demonstrates that coordinating navigation at a systemic level can measurably improve traffic conditions and reduce emissions for all road users, establishing a framework for cooperative routing paradigms.

AI hardware demand may be shifting from speculative "arms race" buying to ROI-driven procurement. As competition consolidates—xAI and Meta notably pivoting—fewer players will blindly acquire GPUs, HBM, and storage. Frontier model training resembles purchasing market-share options; once leaders emerge, their spending discipline tightens. China's open-source models further pressure non-frontier players to abandon expensive training. Demand isn't collapsing but its growth rate is likely decelerating. The real risk: markets priced in ever-escalating competition, not sustainable cash flows.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 中年电竞选手

title: 🔥中国可能要开始给前沿 AI 模型 分级出海
content: China's Ministry of Commerce reportedly plans to restrict the overseas distribution of frontier AI models, including open-source weights. The ministry has met with Alibaba, ByteDance, and Zhipu AI to discuss a tiered system: basic open-source models would require registration, advanced models would undergo security review, and the most sensitive models would remain domestic. This would end the global open-source approach of models like Qwen, DeepSeek, and GLM, mirroring U.S. export controls.

title: Q1 2026 Innovation Graph update: Open source collaboration is accelerating worldwide
content: Q1 2026 saw 16% quarter-over-quarter growth in global open source outbound collaboration—the second highest rate since 2020. GitHub introduced tools to help maintainers manage increased contribution volume, including pull request limits, repo-level controls, pinned comments, noise-reduction banners, performance improvements, and temporary interaction limits. Syria showed notable growth following eased sanctions and expanded GitHub access, with over 8,000 Syrian students receiving the Student Developer Pack in six months.
